q: It's alive! It's alive!
co: Dr. Frankenstein witnesses his creature come to life during a thunderstorm
q_fr: Il est vivant ! Il est vivant !
q_es: ¡Está vivo! ¡Está vivo!

q: I vant to be alone.
co: The famous ballerina dismisses her admirers, becoming one of cinema's most quoted lines
q_fr: Je veux être seule.
q_es: Quiero estar sola.

q: Magic Mirror on the wall, who is the fairest one of all?
fi: Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs
co: The vain Queen consults her enchanted mirror about her beauty
q_fr: Miroir, miroir, dis-moi qui est la plus belle ?
q_es: Espejito, espejito, ¿quién es la más bella del reino?

q: Frankly, my dear, I don't give a damn.
co: Rhett's last words to Scarlett as he walks out after years of war and heartbreak
q_fr: Franchement, ma chère, c'est le cadet de mes soucis.
q_es: Francamente, querida, me importa un bledo.

q: Toto, I've a feeling we're not in Kansas anymore.
co: Dorothy looks around Munchkinland and realizes she has been transported to a strange land
q_fr: Toto, j'ai l'impression qu'on n'est plus au Kansas.
q_es: Toto, creo que ya no estamos en Kansas.

q: There's no place like home.
co: Dorothy clicks her ruby slippers three times to return to Kansas
q_fr: On n'est nulle part aussi bien que chez soi.
q_es: No hay lugar como el hogar.

q: I'll get you, my pretty, and your little dog too!
co: The Witch threatens Dorothy as she tries to steal the ruby slippers
q_fr: Je t'aurai, ma belle, et ton petit chien aussi !
q_es: ¡Te atraparé, preciosa, y a tu perrito también!

q: As God is my witness, I'll never be hungry again!
co: Scarlett vows to survive and rebuild Tara after the devastation of the Civil War
q_fr: Dieu m'est témoin, je ne souffrirai plus jamais la faim !
q_es: ¡Dios me es testigo, nunca volveré a pasar hambre!

q: After all, tomorrow is another day.
co: Scarlett refuses to accept defeat and resolves to win Rhett back
q_fr: Après tout, demain est un autre jour.
q_es: Después de todo, mañana será otro día.

q: Rosebud.
co: The dying tycoon's last word, the mystery that drives the entire film
q_fr: Rosebud.
q_es: Rosebud.

q: The stuff that dreams are made of.
co: Spade describes the Maltese Falcon statuette to a police detective
q_fr: C'est l'étoffe dont les rêves sont faits.
q_es: Está hecho de la materia de los sueños.

q: Here's looking at you, kid.
co: Rick bids farewell to Ilsa at the foggy Casablanca airport
q_fr: Je te regarde, gamine.
q_es: Aquí te miro, chiquilla.

q: Round up the usual suspects.
co: Renault covers for Rick after the shooting of Major Strasser
q_fr: Arrêtez les suspects habituels.
q_es: Arresten a los sospechosos de siempre.

q: We'll always have Paris.
co: Rick tells Ilsa they will always have the memory of their time together in Paris
q_fr: Nous aurons toujours Paris.
q_es: Siempre nos quedará París.

q: Of all the gin joints in all the towns in all the world, she walks into mine.
co: Rick mutters bitterly upon seeing Ilsa walk into his café unexpectedly
q_fr: De tous les bars de toutes les villes du monde, elle entre dans le mien.
q_es: De todos los garitos de todas las ciudades del mundo, entra en el mío.

q: You know how to whistle, don't you? You just put your lips together and blow.
co: The young Marie flirtatiously challenges Steve as she leaves his hotel room
q_fr: Tu sais siffler, non ? Tu poses juste les lèvres et tu souffles.
q_es: Sabes silbar, ¿verdad? Solo juntas los labios y soplas.

q: Every time a bell rings, an angel gets his wings.
co: Young Zuzu explains the meaning of a fallen bell ornament at Christmas
q_fr: Chaque fois qu'une cloche sonne, un ange reçoit ses ailes.
q_es: Cada vez que suena una campana, un ángel recibe sus alas.

q: Badges? We ain't got no badges! We don't need no badges! I don't have to show you any stinking badges!
fi: The Treasure of the Sierra Madre
co: The Mexican bandit dismisses demands to show proof of authority to the prospectors
q_fr: Des insignes ? On n'a pas d'insignes ! On n'en a pas besoin !
q_es: ¿Insignias? ¡No tenemos insignias! ¡No necesitamos insignias!

q: All right, Mr. DeMille, I'm ready for my close-up.
co: Norma descends the staircase in a delusional state, believing cameras are filming her
q_fr: Je suis prête pour mon gros plan, monsieur DeMille.
q_es: Estoy lista para mi primer plano, señor DeMille.

q: I am big. It's the pictures that got small.
co: Norma defends her faded stardom to screenwriter Joe Gillis
q_fr: C'est moi qui suis grande. Ce sont les films qui ont rétréci.
q_es: Soy grande. Son las películas las que se han vuelto pequeñas.

q: Fasten your seatbelts, it's going to be a bumpy night.
co: Margo warns her party guests as tensions rise over the scheming Eve Harrington
q_fr: Attachez vos ceintures, la nuit va être agitée.
q_es: Abróchense los cinturones, va a ser una noche movida.

q: STELLA!
co: Stanley screams for his wife Stella after a poker game argument turns violent
q_fr: STELLA !
q_es: ¡STELLA!

q: I could've been a contender.
co: Terry confronts his brother Charlie about how he threw his boxing career
q_fr: J'aurais pu avoir de la classe, j'aurais pu être un champion. J'aurais pu être quelqu'un au lieu d'être un tocard.
q_es: Podría haber sido un contendiente.

q: Well, nobody's perfect.
co: Osgood's cheerful reply after Jerry reveals he is actually a man
q_fr: Eh bien, personne n'est parfait.
q_es: Bueno, nadie es perfecto.

q: I am Spartacus!
co: Slaves each claim to be Spartacus to protect their leader from crucifixion
q_fr: Je suis Spartacus !
q_es: ¡Yo soy Espartaco!

q: A boy's best friend is his mother.
co: Norman justifies his obsessive devotion to his domineering mother
q_fr: Le meilleur ami d'un garçon, c'est sa mère.
q_es: El mejor amigo de un chico es su madre.

q: Bond. James Bond.
co: Bond introduces himself at a casino table for the very first time on screen
q_fr: Bond. James Bond.
q_es: Bond. James Bond.

q: Nothing is written.
co: Lawrence insists fate is not predetermined before leading men across the Nefud desert
q_fr: Il n'est rien d'écrit.
q_es: Nada está escrito.

q: I'm sorry, Dave. I'm afraid I can't do that.
co: The onboard AI refuses to open the pod bay doors for astronaut Dave Bowman
q_fr: Je suis désolé Dave, je crains de ne pas pouvoir faire ça.
q_es: Lo siento, Dave. Me temo que no puedo hacer eso.

q: Get your stinking paws off me, you damned dirty ape!
co: Taylor speaks for the first time on the Planet of the Apes, shocking his captors
q_fr: Ôtez vos sales pattes de ma personne, espèce de sale singe !
q_es: ¡Aparta tus sucias garras de mí, maldito simio asqueroso!

q: Mrs. Robinson, you're trying to seduce me. Aren't you?
co: A confused young Benjamin realizes the older Mrs. Robinson's intentions
q_fr: Madame Robinson, vous essayez de me séduire. N'est-ce pas ?
q_es: Señora Robinson, está intentando seducirme. ¿Verdad?

q: What we've got here is failure to communicate.
co: The prison warden beats Luke after an escape attempt and lectures the other prisoners
q_fr: Ce qu'on a là, c'est un problème de communication.
q_es: Lo que tenemos aquí es un fracaso de comunicación.

q: They call me Mister Tibbs!
fi: In the Heat of the Night
co: Virgil corrects a racist white police chief who refuses to use his proper title
q_fr: On m'appelle Monsieur Tibbs !
q_es: ¡Me llaman el señor Tibbs!

q: We rob banks.
co: Clyde announces who they are to their first robbery victim with cool nonchalance
q_fr: On braque des banques.
q_es: Robamos bancos.

q: I'm walking here! I'm walking here!
co: Ratso shouts at a taxi that almost hits him and Jon Voight crossing a New York street
q_fr: Je marche là ! Je marche là !
q_es: ¡Estoy caminando aquí! ¡Estoy caminando aquí!

q: Who are those guys?
fi: Butch Cassidy and the Sundance Kid
co: Butch repeatedly asks who the relentless Pinkerton posse chasing them is
q_fr: Mais qui sont ces types ?
q_es: ¿Quiénes son esos tíos?

q: Love means never having to say you're sorry.
co: Oliver repeats Jenny's famous words to his grieving father after her death
q_fr: Aimer, c'est ne jamais avoir à dire pardon.
q_es: Amar significa no tener que pedir perdón.

q: You've got to ask yourself one question: 'Do I feel lucky?' Well, do ya, punk?
co: Harry taunts a wounded bank robber contemplating whether to grab his gun
q_fr: Tu dois te poser qu'une question : 'Est-ce que je tente ma chance ?' Vas-y, tu la tentes ou pas ?
q_es: Tienes que preguntarte una cosa: ¿me siento afortunado? ¿Eh, punk?

q: I'm gonna make him an offer he can't refuse.
co: The Don explains how he will help Johnny Fontane get a Hollywood role
q_fr: Je vais lui faire une offre qu'il ne pourra pas refuser.
q_es: Le haré una oferta que no podrá rechazar.

q: Leave the gun. Take the cannoli.
co: After a mob execution, Clemenza prioritizes the cannoli his wife requested
q_fr: Laisse le flingue. Prends les cannolis.
q_es: Deja la pistola. Coge los cannoli.

q: Soylent Green is people!
co: Thorn screams the horrifying truth about the mysterious food source to the crowd
q_fr: Le Soleil vert, c'est de la chair humaine !
q_es: ¡El Soylent Verde está hecho de personas!

q: Forget it, Jake. It's Chinatown.
co: Walsh consoles Jake after the tragic shooting of Evelyn, accepting the corrupt world
q_fr: Laisse tomber, Jake. C'est Chinatown.
q_es: Olvídalo, Jake. Es Chinatown.

q: Keep your friends close but your enemies closer.
co: Michael advises his adopted brother Tom Hagen on how to handle Senator Geary
q_fr: Garde tes amis près de toi, mais tes ennemis encore plus près.
q_es: Mantén a tus amigos cerca, pero a tus enemigos aún más cerca.

q: You're gonna need a bigger boat.
co: Brody sees the great white shark for the first time and is visibly terrified
q_fr: Vous allez avoir besoin d'un plus gros bateau.
q_es: Vas a necesitar un barco más grande.

q: It's just a flesh wound.
fi: Monty Python and the Holy Grail
co: The Black Knight refuses to yield despite losing both arms in combat
q_fr: Ce n'est qu'une égratignure.
q_es: No es más que un rasguño.

q: I'm as mad as hell, and I'm not going to take this anymore!
co: Unhinged anchorman Howard Beale incites millions of viewers to shout out their windows
q_fr: J'en ai ras-le-bol et je ne le supporterai plus !
q_es: ¡Estoy furioso y no lo voy a aguantar más!

q: Yo, Adrian!
co: Rocky, battered after the full fight, calls out for his girlfriend in the ring
q_fr: Yo, Adrian !
q_es: ¡Yo, Adrian!

q: You talkin' to me?
co: Travis rehearses confrontation alone in his apartment mirror
q_fr: C'est à moi que tu parles ?
q_es: ¿Me estás hablando a mí?

q: May the Force be with you.
co: Han bids farewell to Luke before the Death Star assault, not believing in the Force
q_fr: Que la Force soit avec toi.
q_es: Que la Fuerza te acompañe.

q: Help me, Obi-Wan Kenobi. You're my only hope.
co: Leia's holographic message hidden inside R2-D2 pleads for the Rebel Alliance
q_fr: Aidez-moi, Obi-Wan Kenobi. Vous êtes mon seul espoir.
q_es: Ayúdame, Obi-Wan Kenobi. Eres mi única esperanza.

q: Tell me about it, stud.
co: Sandy's cool reply to Danny after she reinvents herself at the school carnival
q_fr: Raconte-moi ça, beau gosse.
q_es: Cuéntame, machote.

q: I love the smell of napalm in the morning.
co: Kilgore revels in a napalm strike on a Vietnamese village during a beach assault
q_fr: J'adore l'odeur du napalm au matin.
q_es: Me encanta el olor del napalm por la mañana.

q: The horror... the horror...
co: Kurtz's dying words after Willard's assassination, ambiguous and haunting
q_fr: L'horreur... l'horreur...
q_es: El horror... el horror...

q: À bout de souffle.
co: Michel's last words after being shot, lying on the pavement, his final act of defiance
q_es: Sin aliento.

q: Je suis las. Je suis las de la fatigue des autres.
co: Baptiste expresses his exhaustion after years of unrequited love for Garance
q_en: I am weary. I am weary of others' tiredness.
q_es: Estoy cansado. Estoy cansado del cansancio de los demás.

q: Il buono, il brutto, il cattivo.
fi: Il buono, il brutto, il cattivo
co: The title itself became the most iconic phrase of the Spaghetti Western genre
q_en: The Good, the Bad and the Ugly.
q_fr: Le Bon, la Brute et le Truand.
q_es: El bueno, el feo y el malo.

q: La dolce vita.
co: The title phrase, meaning the sweet life, became a universal symbol of carefree hedonism
q_fr: La dolce vita.
q_es: La dolce vita.
